title: CreativeInv
body:
Allows access to the creative inventory in survival (or adventure) mode. Useful for quick experimenting or just messing around.

![Creative inventory open with survival mode hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tzDykdpA/images/e2c8195d24feb5874fbdfc750f1e998a300cea21.png)

## Commands

All commands require OP

`/creative_inv enable [player]`

Enables creative inventory for the specified player, defaults to self

`/creative_inv disable [player]`

Disables creative inventory for the specified player, defaults to self

---

Only the inventory UI and item duplication is enabled, other creative features like instant breaking, free enchantments/projectiles, and infinite item usage are not included by design.

---

Fun fact: During development the mod was called "Subsidy" because your activities were "subsidized" by creative mode
